---
title: "Barbara Clay Finch"
---

## Barbara Clay Finch

**Dates:** (1857/8-1937)

**Maiden name:** (Clay)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1894-8)

### Biography

Author of <i>Lives of the Princesses of Wales</i>.  She was born in Whitchurch, Shropshire, daughter of a solicitor there, and married (1883) the Rev. Henry Brumell Finch (b.1849).

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 12  [1899?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
